coming_soon: Coming soon! All 17 trackers are now complete.

smart_tools.title: Smart Tools
smart_tools.subtitle: 20+ intelligent utilities for better health management

bone_cracking.tip_text: Chronic joint cracking can lead to ligament damage, reduced stability, and potential arthritis over time.
bone_cracking.no_cracking_today: I did NOT crack any joints today
bone_cracking.how_many_times: How many times did you crack?

foot.title: Foot Diary
foot.tip_text: Diabetic foot ulcers are a leading cause of amputation. Daily inspection helps catch problems early.

lab.title: Lab Results
lab.understanding_text: Regular lab monitoring helps track diabetes management. HbA1c reflects 3-month average blood sugar. LDL cholesterol should be under 100 mg/dL for diabetics. Always discuss results with your doctor.

voice.title: Voice Log
voice.not_supported: Speech recognition is not supported in your browser
voice.not_recognized: Command not recognized. Try: 'Log glucose 120', 'Drank 2 glasses of water', or 'Blood pressure 120 over 80'
voice.guide_text: Speak clearly and naturally. You can log glucose, water intake, blood pressure, and walking activity. For example: "Log glucose 118", "Drank 2 glasses of water", or "Blood pressure 120 over 80".

insulin.title: Insulin Site Rotator
insulin.tip_text: Rotating injection sites prevents lipohypertrophy which can affect insulin absorption. Wait at least 1-2 days before reusing the same site.

alerts.title: Smart Alerts
alerts.all_clear_text: No health alerts at this time. Keep up the good work!
alerts.high_glucose_suggestion: Check ketones, drink water, consider gentle exercise.
alerts.low_glucose_suggestion: Eat 15g of fast-acting carbs and recheck in 15 minutes.
alerts.low_water_msg: You've only had {value}ml of water today.
alerts.low_water_suggestion: Aim for 2000ml daily. Dehydration can raise blood sugar.
alerts.no_activity_msg: No exercise logged in last 7 days.
alerts.poor_sleep_suggestion: Poor sleep increases insulin resistance. Aim for 7-9 hours.
alerts.high_bp_suggestion: Monitor your BP regularly and consult your doctor if consistently high.

hair.title: Hair Checker
hair.tip_text: Diabetes can affect hair growth due to poor circulation and hormonal changes. Good blood sugar control helps maintain healthy hair.

caffeine.title: Caffeine Tracker
caffeine.tip_text: Caffeine can raise blood sugar and blood pressure in some people. Monitor your levels after caffeine intake and stay within 400mg daily limit.

salt_sugar.title: Salt & Sugar Balance
salt_sugar.tip_text: WHO recommends <5g salt and <25g added sugar daily. High salt increases BP risk; high sugar spikes blood glucose.

forgetfulness.title: Forgetfulness Tracker
forgetfulness.tip_text: High blood sugar can affect cognitive function and memory. Track lapses to identify patterns and discuss with your doctor.

barber.title: Barbershop Tracker
barber.tip_text: Regular haircuts and grooming help maintain professional appearance and boost confidence. Track your preferences and schedule.

hand.title: Hand Therapy
hand.tip_text: Regular hand exercises improve circulation, reduce stiffness, and help prevent diabetic neuropathy symptoms.

hygiene.title: Hygiene & Grooming
hygiene.tip_text: Regular showers and oral hygiene are especially important for diabetics to prevent skin infections and gum disease.

backup.title: Backup
backup.auto_note: Automatic backups will be saved locally in your browser storage.
backup.import_text: Import a previously saved backup file.
backup.no_backups: No backups created yet. Click 'Create Backup' to save your data.
backup.restore_confirm: Restoring "{name}" will overwrite ALL current data. This cannot be undone. Are you sure?

cloud.title: Cloud Backup
cloud.export_desc: Download a complete backup of ALL your Omni data.
cloud.import_desc: Restore from a previous backup file. This will OVERWRITE all current data.
cloud.data_safe_desc: All backups are stored locally on your device. Cloud sync requires internet connection and a Google account. Your health data is encrypted and never shared.
cloud.import_success: Backup restored successfully! The page will now refresh.

settings.title: Settings
settings.user_name_note: This name will appear in greetings on your dashboard.
settings.auto_backup_note: Set to 0 to disable auto-backup. Data will auto-save to browser storage every X minutes.
settings.import_note: Import a previously exported JSON file. This will overwrite current data!
settings.import_success: Data imported successfully! Please refresh the page to see changes.
settings.import_error: Invalid file format. Please select a valid Omni export file.
settings.clear_note: This will permanently delete ALL your health data. This cannot be undone.
settings.clear_confirm: WARNING: This will delete ALL your data. This cannot be undone. Are you sure?
settings.clear_success: All data has been cleared. The page will now refresh.

dashboard.welcome_message: Please enter your name to personalize your experience

food.title: Food Manager
food.carb_counting_text: For insulin-dependent diabetes, 1 unit of rapid-acting insulin typically covers 10-15g of carbohydrates. Check your blood sugar before and 2 hours after meals to see how different foods affect you.

glucose.title: Glucose Tracker
glucose.tip_text: Fasting: 70-100 mg/dL | Before meals: 70-130 mg/dL | After meals (2h): < 140 mg/dL | Bedtime: 90-150 mg/dL
glucose.tip_consult: Always consult your doctor for personalized targets.

blood_pressure.title: Blood Pressure Tracker
blood_pressure.tip_text: Target BP for most diabetics is < 130/80 mmHg. Regular monitoring helps prevent heart and kidney complications.

water.title: Water Tracker
water.tip_text: Adequate hydration helps control blood sugar and prevents kidney complications. Aim for 2-3 liters daily.

sleep.title: Sleep Tracker
sleep.tip_text: Poor sleep increases insulin resistance and cortisol levels. Aim for 7-9 hours of quality sleep.

activity.title: Activity Tracker
activity.tip_text: Exercise lowers blood sugar by increasing insulin sensitivity. Check glucose before and after workouts.

habits.title: Habit Tracker
habits.tip_text: Smoking increases insulin resistance. Alcohol can cause dangerous blood sugar drops. Regular exercise improves sensitivity.

dental.title: Dental Tracker
dental.tip_text: Diabetes increases risk of gum disease. Brush twice daily, floss daily, and visit dentist every 6 months.

weight.title: Weight Tracker
weight.tip_text: Maintaining healthy weight improves insulin sensitivity. Even 5-10% weight loss reduces complications.

vision.title: Vision Tracker
vision.tip_text: Annual dilated eye exams are essential for early detection of diabetic retinopathy.

hearing.title: Hearing Tracker
hearing.tip_text: Diabetes doubles the risk of hearing loss. Get baseline tests and protect your ears.

skin.title: Skin Tracker
skin.no_daily: No daily skin care logs yet
skin.tip_text: Inspect feet daily for cuts, blisters, redness, or swelling. Report non-healing wounds immediately.

liver.title: Liver Tracker
liver.tip_text: Diabetes increases risk of fatty liver disease. Limit alcohol and monitor liver enzymes.

intestines.title: Digestive Tracker
intestines.tip_text: Fiber helps regulate blood sugar. Aim for 25-30g daily from vegetables, fruits, and whole grains.

bladder.title: Bladder Tracker
bladder.tip_text: Diabetes can cause bladder issues and increase UTI risk. Stay hydrated and report symptoms.

nails.title: Nails Tracker
nails.tip_text: Proper nail care prevents infections. Trim nails straight across and watch for fungal signs.

reproductive.title: Reproductive Tracker
reproductive.tip_text: Hormonal changes affect blood sugar. Track your cycle alongside glucose to identify patterns.
